falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 Index closes above 5,200 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained breakout above this level would contradict the 'HOLD' signal and indicate a bullish trend, invalidating the pattern match to a bottom pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 20-day moving average crosses below the 50-day moving average with a slope steeper than -2.5% per week
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would confirm a bearish trend acceleration, directly contradicting the implied consolidation phase and pattern match to a prior bottom.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score exceeds 65 with a concurrent 14-day true range above 3.2%
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This combination would indicate a confirmed blowoff top scenario, directly contradicting the current 'HOLD' signal and the pattern match to a bottom formation.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
